caribbean.headline: Moderate Winds and Showers Impact Western Caribbean Ports
caribbean.paragraph: Roatan in the Western Caribbean is experiencing sustained winds near 25 kt with wave heights reaching 7.0 ft and an east-northeast swell period of 10 seconds. Rain probability is 50%, indicating a moderate chance of showers affecting marine and port operations today.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Calm Seas Affect Eastern Mediterranean Ports
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing moderate winds sustained at 21 kt with wave heights reaching 5.3 ft and a dominant NNW swell direction at a 6-second period. Rain probability remains less than 10% ensuring stable conditions while Marseille sees slightly higher winds at 22 kt with similarly low rain chances.
